sourceTitle: Artificial Intelligence and Teaching and Learning - Teaching College
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Microsoft Copilot: The University recommends using Microsoft Copilot for AI-related work. It is GDPR-compliant and protects University and personal data. Even though Copilot is GDPR compliant, you should ALWAYS carefully consider whether adding personal information into an AI tool is necessary.
